[PDF_PAGE 106 | score=2] 1lut~ors foreword ""' The Crown and the Serpem is the fourth DRAGON LANCE•: FIFTH AGE• adventure in the five-part series titled Dragons of a New Age. This cycle, which parallels the events of the first trilogy of FIFTH AGE novels, explores the valiant struggles of the Heroes of the Heart against the tyranny of the dragon overlords. In this adventure, the heroes embark upon a quest for an artifact, the Dimernesti Crown of Tides, which could prove decisive in foiling the schemes of the Blue Dragon, Khellendros.
